title: Old New Carved Pumpkins (programmer art)
description: adds a pre-release carved pumpkin texture as a rare replacement for carved pumpkins and jack o'lanterns. this is the programmer art version.
body:
## this is the programmer art version! click [here](https://modrinth.com/project/old-new-carved-pumpkins-jappa) for the jappa version.

during the creation of 1.14's texture update, jappa posted a variety of in-progress screenshots of it. among those was [this carved pumpkin texture](https://x.com/JasperBoerstra/status/924937413318856706). he's a silly guy, but he did replace the original carved pumpkin, which is kind of effed up.

well, thanks to minecraft wiki user [Deshman-gpuser](https://minecraft.wiki/w/File:Carved_Pumpkin_(texture_pre-release).png), he's been recreated! so I have added him to the game, once more.

he has a 1/10 chance to replace carved pumpkins and jack o'lanterns in the world. it's based on block position, so breaking and replacing won't let you change the pumpkin.

there are two versions: programmer art, and jappa. the programmer art version is made by me, based on the recreated texture.

I've tested the resource pack in 1.21.5 and in 1.13, the oldest version with carved pumpkins, so it SHOULD work in those versions and the ones inbetween, but if it somehow breaks inbetween those versions it'd be impressive.
